_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of the methods of persistence.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of data modeling techniques including conceptual, logical, and physical modeling, entity-relationship modeling, dimensional modeling, and data vault methodology.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI DA domain. DA-K-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-K-012 (RC, cosine: 0.363), AB-K-008 (AB, cosine: 0.343).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.4/10 (raw 0.436). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [methods, persistence] vs WIDAI-only terms [conceptual, data, dimensional, entity, logical, methodology] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.886 (P=0.937, R=0.841). P exceeds R by 0.096 — the DCWF element's 6 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 19 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (97.6%). "Knowledge of the methods of persistence." and "Knowledge of data modeling techniques including conceptual, logical, and physica" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.364 < STS 0.436 (gap -0.072). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [methods, persistence] and [conceptual, data, dimensional] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 11.1%. Shared tokens: [knowledge]. DCWF-only: [methods, persistence]. WIDAI-only: [conceptual, data, dimensional, entity, logical, methodology].
